sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى عَبْقَرِيَّةُ الضِّيَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ فِي تِلْكَ الْمَوَائِدِ الْمُتَرَعَةِ بِالْكَرَمِ، حَيْثُ لَا يُعَدُّ الطَّعَامُ مُجَرَّدَ قُوتٍ لِلْأَبْدَانِ، بَلْ هُوَ جِسْرٌ وِجْدَانِيٌّ يَرْبِطُ بَيْنَ الْأَرْوَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Genijalnost arapskog gostoprimstva očituje se u onim trpezama prepunim velikodušnosti, gdje se hrana ne smatra samo potporom tijelu, već emocionalnim mostom koji povezuje duše.
sentences.translationEn: The genius of Arab hospitality is manifested in those tables overflowing with generosity, where food is not considered mere sustenance for bodies, but rather an emotional bridge connecting souls.

sentences.arabic: وَيَحْتَلُّ الرَّغِيفُ مَكَانَةً قُدْسِيَّةً فِي الْمِخْيَالِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، فَهْوَ "الْعَيْشُ" الَّذِي يَقْتَسِمُهُ الْخِلَّانُ لِيُوثِّقُوا عُرَى الْمَوَدَّةِ وَالْمِيثَاقِ الْغَلِيظِ.
sentences.translation: Hljeb zauzima sveto mjesto u narodnoj mašti; on je "život" kojeg prijatelji dijele kako bi učvrstili veze naklonosti i čvrstog zavjeta.
sentences.translationEn: The loaf of bread occupies a sacred position in the popular imagination; it is the 'life' shared by friends to strengthen the bonds of affection and the solemn covenant.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَمَازُجَ التَّوَابِلِ الشَّرْقِيَّةِ، مِنْ زَعْفَرَانٍ وَهَيْلٍ، لَيْسَ إِلَّا تَدْوِيناً حِسِّيّاً لِتَارِيخٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ التَّبَادُلِ الْحَضَارِيِّ عَبْرَ طَرِيقِ الْحَرِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Stapanje istočnjačkih začina, od šafrana do kardamoma, nije ništa drugo do čulni zapis duge istorije civilizacijske razmjene putem Puta svile.
sentences.translationEn: The blending of Eastern spices, from saffron to cardamom, is nothing but a sensory recording of a long history of cultural exchange across the Silk Road.

sentences.arabic: وَتَنْسَابُ طُقُوسُ التَّحْضِيرِ فِي الْمَطَابِخِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ كَسِمْفُونِيَّةٍ رَتِيبَةٍ، تَتَنَاغَمُ فِيهَا حَرَكَةُ الْأَيْدِي مَعَ رَائِحَةِ الشِّوَاءِ الزَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Rituali pripreme u tradicionalnim kuhinjama teku poput ritmične simfonije, u kojoj se pokreti ruku usklađuju s mirisom pečenja.
sentences.translationEn: The rituals of preparation in traditional kitchens flow like a rhythmic symphony, in which the movement of hands harmonizes with the fragrant aroma of roasting.

sentences.arabic: وَتُشَكِّلُ "الْجَمَاعَةُ" حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي ثَقَافَةِ الْأَكْلِ، إِذْ تَنْصَهِرُ الْفَوَارِقُ الطَّبَقِيَّةُ أَمَامَ صَحْنٍ وَاحِدٍ يَجْمَعُ الْقَاصِيَ وَالدَّانِيَ.
sentences.translation: Zajednica čini kamen temeljac kulture ishrane, jer se klasne razlike tope pred jednom posudom koja okuplja i daleke i bliske.
sentences.translationEn: The 'community' forms the cornerstone of the eating culture, as class differences melt away before a single dish that gathers the distant and the near.

sentences.arabic: وَرَغْمَ غَزْوِ الْحَدَاثَةِ، لَا تَزَالُ الْأَصَالَةُ تَنْبِضُ فِي تَفَاصِيلِ الْأَطْبَاقِ الْمَوْرُوثَةِ الَّتِي تَأْبَى الِانْدِثَارَ أَمَامَ مَوْجَاتِ الطَّعَامِ السَّرِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos prodoru modernosti, autentičnost i dalje pulsira u detaljima naslijeđenih jela koja odbijaju nestati pred talasima brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the invasion of modernity, authenticity still pulses in the details of inherited dishes that refuse to vanish before the waves of fast food.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ هُوَ مَلْحَمَةٌ مِنَ النَّكَهَاتِ، تَرْوِي لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَتَذَوَّقُهَا قِصَصاً عَنِ الْأَرْضِ، وَالسَّمَاءِ، وَالْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja je ep o ukusima, koji svakome ko ga okusi priča priče o zemlji, nebu i čovjeku.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab kitchen is an epic of flavors, telling everyone who tastes it stories about the earth, the sky, and man.
